name: Urban Champion
description:
Urban Champion is a 2D side-scrolling fighting game for two players, where the characters are depicted as street toughs battling in an urban environment. The primary objective is to knock your opponent into an open manhole cover, resulting in an instant win. The fighters are positioned on a street, and the background features buildings, windows, and occasionally, an angry neighbor who throws flower pots down onto the street. 

Gameplay revolves around depleting your opponent's stamina by landing punches. As a character's stamina decreases, they become more vulnerable and are pushed back more easily with each punch. Blocking reduces the impact of punches and minimizes stamina loss, but it doesn't prevent it entirely. Fighters can also taunt their opponent, which can potentially intimidate them and cause them to back away. If the players are on opposite sides of the street when a flower pot is tossed, the character directly beneath the window is briefly stunned, leaving them open to attack. 

When a fighter's stamina is low enough, a successful punch will knock them backward, potentially into the open manhole. Players can also attempt to push the opponent into the manhole with consecutive punches. The gameplay continues until one player is knocked into the manhole or until a specific number of rounds are won.
